name: Purefoy Hotel Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the butter in a heavy skillet until it reaches a golden brown color.
2. Remove the butter to a mixing bowl (not plastic) and stir in the sugar.
3. Gradually add the Karo syrup, stirring continuously until fully incorporated.
4. Beat in each egg one at a time, ensuring there are no lumps.
5. Toss the pecan halves with the mixture so they are evenly coated.
6. Pour the entire mixture into the prepared pie shell.
7. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 375°F and continue baking for an additional 40-50 minutes, or until the crust is set and golden brown.
8. If the crust starts to darken too quickly, cover it entirely with aluminum foil.
9. The pie is done when the pecans are richly dark brown and the filling is completely congealed (test by tapping lightly).
